# CWE-89 safe: same-function literal Prepare → Stmt.Query (bound params)
lang: go
file: CWE-89-prepare-same-var-safe.go
variant: taint-prepare
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// LookupUser uses a prepared statement with a literal SQL string and bound arg.
func LookupUser(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	stmt, err := db.Prepare("SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE name = ?")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)
		return
	}
	defer stmt.Close()
	rows, err := stmt.Query(name)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
